creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2007-03-06 20:12:55 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    sysutils             Makefile 
  Added files:
    sysutils/facter      Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  A cross-platform Ruby library for retrieving facts from operating systems.
  Supports multiple resolution mechanisms, any of which can be restricted to
  working only on certain operating systems or environments. Facter is
  especially useful for retrieving things like operating system names, IP
  addresses, MAC addresses, and SSH keys.
  
  WWW:    http://www.reductivelabs.com/projects/facter/
  
  PR:             ports/109794
  Submitted by:   Tomoyuki Sakurai <cherry at trombik.mine.nu>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.896     +1 -0      ports/sysutils/Makefile
  1.1       +27 -0     ports/sysutils/facter/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/sysutils/facter/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/sysutils/facter/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/sysutils/facter/pkg-plist (new)
